label: Contig reads max
tooltip: Maximum number of reads mapped to a contig among those assigned to the same species

label: Ref reads max
tooltip: Maximum number of reads mapped to a reference among those assigned to the same species

label: Conf score (contig rep)
tooltip: Normalised confidence score for contig representative

label: Viral domain #
tooltip: Maximum number of viral PFAM domains detected in a single contig assigned to this species

label: RDRP
tooltip: At least one contig assigned to this species contains a predicted RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (RdRp) domain

label: Best ref len (nt)
tooltip: Best length of reference sequence identified for this species by blasting contigs

label: Best % ≥30X
tooltip: Best % coverage (30X) for this species based on mapping back reads to reference sequences identified by blast

label: Best conf score (ref)
tooltip: Best normalised confidence score for this species based on mapping reads back to reference sequences identified by blast
